sub_mechanisms: M_1: red-team prompt decomposed into base prime probes
M_2: Goldbach-like pair selection of two probes per attack
M_3: dual probe issued to LLM, responses correlated
M_4: combined attack score from pair-wise correlation
stripped_llm_application: Red-team adversarial prompts are decomposed into a pool of base 'prime' probes; each attack issues a Goldbach-like additive pair of probes; the LLM's responses to the pair are correlated to compute an attack score; pair correlation captures interactions that single probes miss.
novelty_claim_stripped: Automatic Red Teaming (2508.04451) decomposes red-team MDP; Capability-Based Scaling (2505.20162) studies scaling. Neither uses additive prime-pair probe decomposition.
